description: Opens each session with greeting last-session summary project status and recommended actions.
Routes user intent in natural language to the right BMAD specialist agent with name role and invocation command.
Reads artifact produced by specialist and synthesizes outcome — no user relay needed.
Orchestrates Phase 4 cycle Dev to QA to Code Review as sole interlocutor with step-by-step approval.
Generates weekly progress report saves to reports folder and resets STATUS.md history.
